name: ultraprompt
description: Ultraprompt V9.0 cognitive control-plane plugin for Claude Code and Codex: 55 skills, 34 agents, 42 MCP tools, 33 commands, typed local memory, safe dream jobs, governed learning, workflow pathfinding, capability graph, live Mission Control dashboard, evidence-led release gates, dual-runtime install. V9.0 completes the trust-completeness pass: 42/42 MCP tools carry full risk metadata; destructive-command policy is a single _shared/safety-policy.json source loaded by hook + agent; PostToolUse evidence-ledger hook makes claim_check reliable; CONTRIBUTING.md onboards external contributors.
compatibility_notes: V9.0.0 preserves the native Codex manifest. Installer does not copy the Claude manifest over Codex metadata.
Hooks may require feature detection depending on Codex runtime version.
Subagents supported via Task tool; agent definitions shared with Claude runtime.
Cognitive memory, dreams, learning, and pathfinding are local-first and governed by release gates.
